data.title: 国际服网页活动「Special Mission Event!」
data.summary: Sensei! We’ve prepared a Special Mission Event just for you, in appreciation of always staying by ou
data.body:
Sensei!
We’ve prepared a Special Mission Event just for you, in appreciation of always staying by our side!

Head over to the in-game event page, complete the missions, and claim all the special rewards we’ve prepared just for you~

➡️ See details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=3302502
![G8RJc0va4Acz8Xh.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/4417/GsNPEz474v1YlFOWDkCt0d8xnwtfGiZl.jpg)
